Hold up the smiling plate. Make {friend} smile back.
Hold up the surprised plate. Gasp dramatically with it.
Hold up the sleepy plate. Yawn quietly along with it.
Wave the puppet at {friend}. The show is done.
Stand face to face with {friend}.
Start with a simple high-five.
Add a low five right after.
What's the third move?
Bump elbows twice with {friend}.
Spin once and end with a big wave.
Bump fists with your hands turned the wrong way.
Do the whole handshake twice in a row. Then cheer together.
The biggest piece of furniture in {room} is now a mountain.
Tie pretend ropes to your waist. {sidekick} ties theirs too.
Climb up the side carefully, one slow handhold at a time.
At the summit, what do you do?

choices.label: Take three slow breaths and look out far

steps.text: Plant a paper flag at the peak. Stand tall.
Breathe in slow three times. Look out at the wide world.
Climb back down carefully. High-five {sidekick} at the bottom.
Stand on a small stage spot in {room}. {guide_mentor} watches.
Raise an invisible baton above your head.
Wave it down — the strings begin a long slow note.
Which section comes in next?
Sweep your baton up. Hum a trumpet line proudly.
Pump your baton down. Thump-thump-thump like a steady drum.
Wiggle your baton in curls. Hum a winding flute tune.
Hold the baton up. Freeze. Then bow to {guide_mentor}.
Line up three toy cars in front of {helper_townsperson}.
Wipe the first car with a paper-towel cloth.
Wipe the second car the same careful way.
What polish do the cars want?
Buff each car with fast spinning wipes. Sparkle!
Buff each car with long slow strokes. Shine!
Line the clean cars up in a row. Bow to {helper_townsperson}.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart in a quiet spot.
Sway side to side slowly with arms loose.
Lift one arm up and over your head. Lower it slow.
Do the same with the other arm. Close your eyes if you like.
{quest_giver} marks a 'dig site' in the corner of {room}.
Get on knees with a small brush or your fingers as a brush.
Brush back the carpet to 'uncover' a buried bone.
What did you find?
Lift the long tail bone and lay it carefully on the ground.
Lift the spiky bone with a serious paleontologist face.
Lift the giant tooth and hold it up like a trophy.
Give your new dinosaur a name. Tell it to {quest_giver}.
Pretend two flat hands are slices of bread.
{trickster} adds the first pretend ingredient: rainbow jelly.
What is the next pretend filling?
Mime laying down moon-cheese carefully. Crunch crunch.
Mime piling cloud-noodles. Wobble your hands as they go on.
Mime placing three sparkly leaves on top.
Close the bread hands. Pretend to take the biggest bite ever.
Lay six small flat objects in a curving line across {room}.
Imagine they are stepping stones over a deep ravine.
Step onto the first stone with both feet.
How do you cross?

choices.label: Slide and balance, never lifting feet

steps.text: Jump softly from each stone to the next. Don't fall in.
Slide one foot, then the other, keeping balance.
Reach the other side. Wave triumphantly to {sidekick}.
Find a small towel. Tie or tuck it around your shoulders as a cape.
Stand tall in a hero pose with hands on hips.
What kind of hero are you today?
Zoom across {room} on tippy-toes. Strike a pose at the end.
Walk slow and quiet. Help a toy off the floor and onto a shelf.
Sit and 'solve' a pretend puzzle by tapping your chin.
Take a bow with {friend}. Hang up the cape carefully.
Lay paper down. No real paint — only your finger and imagination.
Draw one slow curve from corner to corner.
Add three small soft dots wherever you like.
Show {friend} the page. Don't say what it is.
{guide_mentor} faces you in the middle of {room}.
Kneel on one knee. Place a fist on your heart.
Speak a single brave word — your choice.
What do you vow?

choices.label: To always tell the truth gently

steps.text: Say 'I vow to always share snacks.' Bow.
Say 'I vow to always listen first.' Bow.
Say 'I vow to always tell the truth gently.' Bow.
Rise tall. {guide_mentor} touches each shoulder with an invisible sword.
Pick up a banana, a brick, or your hand as a pretend phone.
Ring-ring! Answer with 'hello, this is...' and your name.
Who is calling?
Listen and nod. Tell the dragon to please don't burn your snacks.
Listen patiently and remind them today is, well, today.
Listen and ask one question about flying cars.
Say 'goodbye!' Hang up by setting the phone down.
Stand still. Pretend a huge soft bubble surrounds you.
Trace the outside of the bubble with both hands, slow and smooth.
Take three tiny tip-toe steps across {room} without popping it.
What floats inside with you?
Cup hands around the imaginary glow and smile.
Hum a low slow note inside the bubble.
Pop the bubble softly with one fingertip. Wave at {friend}.
Set out two cups as cooking pots. {frenemy} stands across the table.
Drop a pretend fish into each pot with a plop sound.
Stir your pot with grand pirate arm motions.
What is your secret pirate spice?
Sprinkle pretend seaweed and arr at {frenemy}.
Squeeze three pretend lime drops and grin.
Whisper 'thunder-salt' and clap once like thunder.
Both taste a pretend spoonful. Declare it a tie and laugh.
Stand in front of {friend} like a TV weather person.
Point at an imaginary map on the wall.
Today's silly forecast is...
Wiggle fingers as 'jellybeans' pretend-fall everywhere.
Sweep your arms like big feathery gusts.
Spread arms wide. Hug yourself, then aim a hug at {friend}.
Sign off: 'Back to you, {friend}.' Take a bow.
Walk slowly across {room} with {friend} beside you.
Count each step out loud in a quiet voice.
Stop at {count}. Stand still for one breath.
Build a 'fire' of crumpled paper in the middle of the floor.
Sit around it with {sidekick}. Wiggle fingers as flames.
What do you share around the fire?

choices.label: A story about a brave bug
A song with one note hummed slow

steps.text: Tell the bug story in three short lines.
Hum the same low note together for ten seconds.
Pretend to skewer a marshmallow and toast it slowly.
Wave goodnight to the fire. Pretend to put it out gently.
{quest_giver} holds a paper bag with one thing hidden inside.
Close your eyes. Reach in and feel one item gently.
What do you think it is?
Guess 'soft and small.' Open your eyes and check.
Guess 'bumpy and round.' Open your eyes and check.
Guess 'long and smooth.' Open your eyes and check.
Either way, cheer with {quest_giver}. Trade roles next round.
Sit on the floor near {friend}. Pat thighs in a slow drumroll.
Pick up the speed gradually until it's a real roll.
Freeze on a giant air-cymbal crash.
What dance comes next?
Stand and spin slowly with arms out wide.
Stomp your feet in rhythm. Shake the imaginary floor.
Wobble like a wet noodle with floppy arms.
End with a big bow toward {friend}.
Sit at a table with paper and one crayon.
Draw a small square in the middle — your castle.
Add a winding path leading away from the door.
Show {friend} the map. Whisper one place the path leads to.
{sidekick} sits as the audience while you act out animals.
Without a sound, act out a giraffe stretching its neck high.
Without a sound, act out a frog crouching and hopping.
{sidekick} picks the next silent animal.
Tip-toe in a slinky cat walk across {room}.
Bounce twice with hands tucked at your chest.
Lower onto hands and knees and crawl very slowly.
Bow to {sidekick}. {sidekick} cheers without speaking.
{guide_mentor} announces today's three powers: speed, kindness, and balance.
Run in place for ten seconds — speed power activated.
Help a toy off the floor and onto a shelf — kindness power activated.
How do you train balance?

choices.label: Stand on one foot for five seconds

steps.text: Lift one foot and balance, eyes on a fixed point.
Walk heel-to-toe slow and smooth.
Take the hero oath: 'I will help when I can.' Bow to {guide_mentor}.
Cut a small rectangle of paper. {friend} watches helpfully.
Write or draw one kind thing you'll do — like a hug or a help.
Hand the coupon to {friend} with a bow.

templates.title: Toy boat race in the sink

steps.text: Find two small boats — paper or plastic — and a flat surface.
Set them at the starting line. {friend} cheers from the side.
Blow gently to start the race.
What's the race style?

choices.label: Loop the table — both must turn

steps.text: Blow with steady strong breath. Watch each boat go.
Steer each boat in a wide loop with little side puffs.
Cheer for both boats with {friend}. Take a victory bow.
Sit face to face with {trickster}. Pick three made-up sounds.
Sound one means 'hello.' Try it out.
Sound two means 'thank you.' Try it out.
What does sound three mean?
Say the third sound and pat the floor like you're inviting play.
Say the third sound and pat your belly like you're hungry.
Say the third sound and wave a slow goodbye.
Use all three sounds in a row with {trickster}. Laugh together.
{needs_saving} sits as the honored guest.
Event one: long stand-on-one-foot. Try it for five seconds.
Event two: slow-motion star jump.
Pick a third silly event.

choices.label: Silent giggle — laugh with no sound

steps.text: Hold your silliest face as long as you can.
Shake with silent laughter for ten seconds.
Stand on tippy-toes with eyes closed.
Hang an invisible medal around {needs_saving}'s neck. Bow.
Fold a paper hat. Place it on your head proudly.
{helper_townsperson} wears a folded paper hat too.
Parade together once around {room}.
What is the festival theme?
Wave hands above the hat like soft cloud puffs.
Wave hands above the hat like feathers fluttering.
Say 'ding' once each time you nod the hat.
Take a tiny hat-bow to {helper_townsperson}.
{guide_mentor} dims the lights and points at the ceiling.
Lie down on a soft spot. Breathe in slow for four.
Breathe out slow for four. Look up and pretend the ceiling is stars.
Whisper one thing you are grateful for today.
